goal: Add a strict model-cache preparation CLI and wire it into the external CUDA real-adapter handoff before preflight/training.
head: eff6486
blocked_scope: Changing model catalog pins, hashes, or verifier acceptance policy
Downloading or committing model weights, adapters, Docker images, endpoint transcripts, copied evidence bundles, or GO release evidence
Editing M6 review docs to GO
Claiming M6-RC or v0 release GO from current local artifacts
allowed_edit_paths_scope_note: This gate may add strict model-cache preparation tooling, wire external CUDA handoff/packet/recertification instructions to that tooling, refresh current NOT_GO artifacts, update LLM context/working state, completion log, and PABCD only.
required_commands: PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 ./.venv/bin/python scripts/prepare_cuda_lora_training_run.py --dataset-jsonl examples/fixtures/router_20.jsonl --dataset-id review_router_20 --base-model microsoft/Phi-3.5-mini-instruct --model-cache-dir /tmp/mib-strict-model-cache-phi/model_cache --output-root /tmp/mib-real-adapter --training-preset quick
required_evidence: Strict model-cache CLI verifies pinned catalog files without downloading by default and reports NOT_READY when required files are absent.
External CUDA training handoff command order includes prepare_strict_model_cache before preflight_cuda_training.
Operator packet required committed files include scripts/prepare_strict_model_cache.py and verifier requires the new command order.
Recertification next actions point operators to the strict model-cache preparation command without claiming M6-RC or v0 GO.
executed_verification_commands: PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 ./.venv/bin/python scripts/prepare_cuda_lora_training_run.py --dataset-jsonl examples/fixtures/router_20.jsonl --dataset-id review_router_20 --base-model microsoft/Phi-3.5-mini-instruct --model-cache-dir /tmp/mib-strict-model-cache-phi/model_cache --output-root /tmp/mib-real-adapter --training-preset quick
warnings: The current host still lacks real trained adapter no-fake Docker endpoint evidence.
This gate does not download model weights or run CUDA training; it only adds and wires the guarded preparation command.

phase_notes.plan: Expose strict model-cache preparation as a repo-local operator CLI and make external CUDA handoff/packet/recertification reference it before training preflight.
phase_notes.audit: Current recertification says to prepare the strict model cache but does not provide a concrete repo-local command in the external handoff path.
phase_notes.build: Add prepare_strict_model_cache.py, focused tests, handoff generator wiring, packet/verifier contract updates, refreshed current NOT_GO artifacts, docs, completion log, and PABCD.
phase_notes.check: Run focused tests, py_compile, no-download NOT_READY model-cache preparation, regenerate handoff/packet, verify packet, recertify NOT_GO, JSON/search evidence, and diff checks.
phase_notes.done: After verification passes, stage, commit, and push this strict model-cache handoff phase.

pabcd.approved_scope: Strict model-cache preparation CLI plus external CUDA handoff/packet/recertification wiring, focused tests, refreshed NOT_GO artifacts, docs/CONTEXT.md, docs/WORKING.md, completion log, and PABCD only.
pabcd.blocked_scope: No product runtime/API/UI/DB/schema changes, no catalog pin changes, no verifier weakening, no M6 GO docs, no model/adapter/Docker/evidence bundle commits, no release GO claim.
pabcd.phase_completion_git_policy: When verification/evidence commands finish, stage, commit, and push this phase.
pabcd.plan: Expose strict model-cache preparation as a repo-local operator CLI and make external CUDA handoff/packet/recertification reference it before training preflight.
pabcd.audit: Current recertification says to prepare the strict model cache but does not provide a concrete repo-local command in the external handoff path.
pabcd.build: Add prepare_strict_model_cache.py, focused tests, handoff generator wiring, packet/verifier contract updates, refreshed current NOT_GO artifacts, docs, completion log, and PABCD.
